scripts.dev:clean: npm run clean && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.build: npm -w frontend run build && npm -w backend run build
scripts.start: concurrently -n back,front -c auto "npm:run -w backend start" "npm:run -w frontend preview"
scripts.clean: rimraf node_modules frontend/node_modules backend/node_modules frontend/package-lock.json backend/package-lock.json
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm -w frontend install && npm -w backend install
